positive: A whimsical, highly stylized forest scene silhouette. Central focus on a cluster of anthropomorphic woodland animals (fox, owl, bunny) interacting with glowing bioluminescent flora and oversized, delicate mushrooms. The overall mood is peaceful and magical. Use a deep indigo and emerald green color palette against stark black negative space. Composition must be balanced and circular, emphasizing strong silhouettes and graphic contrast. Minimalist print style, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Highly detailed linework, vector art feel, clean edges.
negative: blur, grain, artifact, watermark, text, messy lines, low detail, busy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, writing, logo, copyright
